name: ProcessImageLibrary
title: Image Library
summary: A drop-in visuals manager for ProcessWire: install it on any existing site — zero setup, it auto-discovers every image field — then manage every image from one filterable table. Keep one canonical copy and reuse it anywhere (insert into rich-text or any image field, no re-upload), edit metadata inline and in bulk, manage tags, rename / replace / delete safely, automatically de-duplicate, and see where each image is used.
author: frameless Media

permissions.image-library-access: Access the Image Library admin page
permissions.image-library-manage-shared: Manage shared Image Library bookmarks and collections
